title: ruilopezia bracteosa
intro: Ruilopezia bracteosa, also known as the bracteate Ruilopezia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ruilopezia bracteosa are believed to include wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Ruilopezia bracteosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
